name: TARGETPAIRS_OVER_PATENT_THRESHOLD
description: List target pairs whose patent count is greater than a threshold (default 50).
cypher:
WITH coalesce($min_count, 50) AS min_count
MATCH (tp:TargetPair)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)
WITH tp.name AS target_pair, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count, min_count
WHERE patent_count > min_count
RETURN target_pair, patent_count
ORDER BY patent_count DESC, target_pair
LIMIT 50;

examples: Which target pairs have more than 50 patents?
